productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Printed Red T-shirt
description: Composition Red Official Merchandise manchester united T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has round neck with back neck inner seam binding, short sleeves with printed branding on right sleeve, graphic print on chest and contrast double top-stitching around back neck and shoulder seams Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron, do not iron on print Dress for greatness with this Official Merchandise Manchester United football Club polo t-shirt. This short sleeved top pays homage to the incredibly successful team with Club badge on the front and bold text across the back. Team this with jeans and a tee for a trip to a football match or for casual outings when only the genuine Man U article will do. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
